(async()=>{const v=document.getElementById('view-mermas');v.classList.add('active');v.style.display='';document.querySelectorAll('.view').forEach(x=>{if(x!==v)x.classList.remove('active')});const l=document.getElementById('listMermas');l.innerHTML=Array.from({length:4},(_,i)=>`
🧺
PRODUCTO DE PRUEBA LARGO ${i+1}
775024325303${i}
−50.0undde 50
⚠ 99d sin resolver
📍 ZONA-0211/7/2026
`).join('');await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,300));const cs=getComputedStyle(l);const card=l.querySelector('.merma-card');const th=l.querySelector('.merma-thumb');return{cols:cs.gridTemplateColumns,gap:cs.gap,cardW:Math.round(card.getBoundingClientRect().width),thumbW:Math.round(th.getBoundingClientRect().width),nameFs:getComputedStyle(l.querySelector('.merma-card-name')).fontSize};})()
